positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette of a celestial night sky scene. Central composition featuring a gentle crescent moon, a cluster of abstract glowing constellations (like connected dots and curved lines), and stylized whimsical nebulas in deep sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and touches of teal. The overall design should have a geometric, clean, and airy feel, suitable for being printed large on apparel. Use negative space heavily to emphasize the clean silhouette. Art style: Vector art inspired, high contrast, flat graphic design, ink wash quality, elegant line work, perfect for repeat patterns or singular central print. Cinematic lighting, high definition, vibrant yet sophisticated color palette, centered, symmetrical, seamless.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, celebrity likenesses, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photo, realistic, grunge, cluttered, dirty, busy background, messy
